fullText: [Music] so my name is I'm working for a Siemens he and currently I am the service manager for code quality platform uh which runs on Sonar Cube application [Music] okay we've been uh the customer of Sona source with the sonar Cube application uh since 2015. uh since that time uh we have made a long journey from uh let's say piloting certain projects within the Siemens organization and testing the uh the whole Pro product and the processes until now where most of our productive code base is scanned by by Sonos sonar Q to improve and make sure that the quality of our product in a software development is is high and uh that the the delivered products are then stable foreign [Music]
